infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to camera to capture sperm samples for analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to microphone for video recording.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to photo library to save analysis results.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Sperm Analyzer to access your camera for analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Sperm Analyzer to access your photos for saving results.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Sperm Analyzer to save analysis results to your photo library.
